svg.title: How Praxis is built: four layers, only one of which can block
svg.desc: Four stacked layers. Output style sets the mindset every turn. Skills carry the reasoning workflows. Read-only subagents perform deep vertical audits in isolated context. Hooks are the deterministic gates — the only layer that can refuse.

g.font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
g.text: The doctrine, re-applied on every turn — plan first, document first, finish the work, report precisely.
The reasoning workflows: orchestrator, prompt-architect, best-practices, code-craft, front-end, repo audit.
Nine vertical auditors, one concern each, in isolated context — adversarial, regression, duplication, performance.
Session orientation, the prompt router, the secret and destructive-command guard, and the Stop gate.
THE ONLY LAYER THAT CAN REFUSE
